# @andes/widther

<br />

A higher-order component (HOC) that adds a width-based CSS class to a wrapped component.

<br />

## How to use

<br />

### Installation

> Follow the [general installation guide](../../docs/installation.md).

```bash

npm install --save @andes/widther

```

### Scripts

> Follow the [general scripts usage guide](../../docs/scripts-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your page:

```jsx

import { Widther } from '@andes/widther';

```

## Public API

| Property | Description | Type | Default | Required |
| -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------- | -------- |
| `className` | Custom class. | `string` | `undefined` |  |
| `width` | Custom width. | `number: 25, 50, 75, 100, 150, 200` | `undefined` |  |
